session.user: Run the following command from the repository root /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report the full output: make lint ty Report any failures with file paths and line numbers.
session.assistant: I'll run the linting and type checking commands for you.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run linting and type checking via make

session.tool_result: uv run ruff check All checks passed! uv run ty check All checks passed!
session.assistant:
Success: All checks passed.
**ruff linting**: No violations found **ty type checking**: No errors found
Both linting and type checking completed successfully with no issues to report.
